title: React State Race Conditions in Async Operations
essence: Multiple async operations update same state simultaneously causing UI inconsistencies
symptoms: UI shows stale data during async operations
Button states not matching actual operation status
Intermittent UI glitches during rapid interactions
repro_steps: Start multiple async operations rapidly (e.g., score calculation + match computation)
root_cause: Async operations don't check if they're still current before updating state, causing race conditions with requestIdRef patterns
do_not_do: Update state without checking operation validity
Start new operations without canceling previous
Ignore component unmount during async updates
guardrails: Use request IDs or abort controllers
Check component mounted state before updates
Cancel pending operations on new requests
prevent_tests: Verify state consistency during async operations
Check for memory leaks in event listeners

evidence.notes: Common React pattern issue - affects user perceived performance
